name: Chocolate-Marbled Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, heavy cream, milk, light corn syrup, and salt in a heavy, large saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture slowly to boiling, stirring constantly until the sugar dissolves.
3. Continue boiling gently, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches 238°F on a candy thermometer or reaches the soft ball stage.
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 5 minutes.
5. Add the vanilla and beat vigorously until the mixture begins to thicken and loses its glossy appearance, about 5 minutes.
6. Pour half of the fudge into a well-buttered 8x8x2-inch baking pan and sprinkle evenly with half of the chocolate pieces.
7. Pour in the remaining fudge and sprinkle with the remaining chocolate pieces.
8. Cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Cut into 1-inch squares.
